name: builderos-pm-skills
description: BuilderOS PM workflow skills: customer discovery, PM/CTO/UX planning, PRD-to-tech-plan, PRD-to-epic, UI/PM/R&D review, learn/retro, competitor feature analysis, feature measurement, Mixpanel instrumentation, and external-doc ingestion into the Knowledge layer. Designed for product managers using Monday, Mixpanel, Notion, Gmail and similar tools via MCP.
